name: trend-team-strategy
description: A Codex methodology plugin for designing, implementing, verifying, and finalizing TSLab trading strategies.

interface.shortDescription: Methodology for TSLab strategy design, risk, verification, and delivery
interface.longDescription: Trend Team Strategy guides Codex through a disciplined workflow for TSLab trading strategies: research, design, authoring, risk management, verification, optimization, and final documentation. It is a methodology layer intended to work with an existing TSLab Web API workspace.
defaultPrompt: Build a TSLab strategy with risk controls.
